teams.name: Seattle Mariners
headlines: Matt Brash exits after just 2 pitches with side discomfort
Ryan Young extends RBI streak to six games with late-inning heroics
Andres Munoz records sixth save of the season in 5-3 win over Twins
Rob Refsnyder hits solo home run to take lead against Cardinals

details.injury_update: Matt Brash left game after 2 pitches with side discomfort, will be checked out on team day off

player_highlights.ryan_young: .286/.357/.420 slash line through 32 games, 3 HR, 2 SB, 19 RBI, 20 runs
player_highlights.andres_munoz: 6 saves on the season, struck out two in perfect ninth inning

teams.name: Seattle Seahawks
headlines: Seahawks sign veteran tight end Harrison Bryant
Team participates in offseason workout at Virginia Mason Athletic Center
Meet the Seahawks 2026 Draft Class features Emmanuel Henderson Jr. (6th round)

details.free_agency: Signed TE Harrison Bryant, former John Mackey Award winner from Cleveland Browns
details.draft_class: Emmanuel Henderson Jr. (Kansas WR) selected in 6th round of 2026 NFL Draft
details.udfa_tracker: Tracking undrafted free agents where Seahawks historically shine under GM John Schneider
details.offseason_status: Ongoing offseason workouts and team activities

teams.name: Seattle Kraken
headlines: Kraken must keep pace with rising division powers in Pacific
Kirkland and Kraken team up to continue growing the game with new ice rinks/community center

details.playoff_status: Team spent most of year in playoff mix but unraveled after Olympic break
details.community_news: Joint ice rinks/community center project between City of Kirkland and Seattle Kraken breaks ground May 2026
details.team_assessment: Current lineup mix of mid-tier veterans and developing youngsters

teams.name: Seattle Sounders FC
headlines: Sounders FC re-airs return to FOX 13+ for 2026 MLS Season
2026 MLS regular season schedule features 34 matches (17 home, 17 away)

details.broadcasting: Games airing on FOX 13+ for 2026 season
details.season_schedule: 34 matches total, primarily against 14 other Western Conference teams, 6 Eastern Conference opponents
details.season_status: Regular season ongoing, last updated April 26, 2026

other_major_news.note: NBA and NHL playoffs ongoing as of late April 2026
